name: Shrimp in Champagne Sauce with Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add mushrooms and cook until they release their juices and begin to evaporate.
3. Remove the mushrooms using a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. In the same saucepan, combine shrimp, champagne, and salt.
5. Heat to a simmer, then bring to a boil. The shrimp are done when the liquid just begins to boil.
6. Using a slotted spoon, remove the shrimp immediately and set them aside.
7. Add chopped shallots and tomatoes to the cooking liquid. Reduce over high heat until the liquid is reduced to about 1/2 cup, approximately 8 minutes.
8. Stir in heavy cream and continue boiling for 1 to 2 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
9. Return shrimp and mushrooms to the sauce; reheat briefly.
10. Season with additional salt and pepper if needed.
11. Cook pasta according to package directions, then drain thoroughly and return to heat.
12. Toss with remaining cream and parsley. Divide pasta among four plates, spooning shrimp and sauce over the top.
13. Makes 4 servings.
